title: OpenRoleHQ - AI Job Search Workspace
description: OpenRoleHQ helps candidates manage a faster, more focused job search. I worked on the frontend experience for role discovery, resume tailoring, onboarding, and dashboard flows, with AI features designed to support the user without getting in the way.
notes: Built the core frontend around reliable auth state, guided onboarding, AI-assisted workflows, and a dashboard that keeps the application process easy to follow.

title: HRIS - Workforce Management Dashboard
description: A practical HR platform for onboarding, document review, staff records, and admin reporting. The work focused on making dense workforce data easier to manage through clear dashboards, role-aware flows, and dependable state.
notes: Improved the admin experience around authentication, workforce tables, document checks, and reporting views so the platform could support real operational use.

title: Leban Street Resturant - Fast Food Ordering Experience
description: A restaurant ordering platform built around speed, clear product discovery, and a smoother checkout path. The project included cart logic, delivery-fee handling, and performance work that supported stronger conversion.
notes: Refined the ordering and checkout flow with location-aware delivery pricing, clearer cart behavior, and performance-minded frontend decisions.

title: Bukky Group - Multi-Brand Business Website
description: A polished website for a group of beauty, fashion, food, and empowerment brands. I focused on service discovery, brand storytelling, responsive UI, SEO-friendly structure, and a frontend that could hold several business lines without feeling crowded.
notes: Created a premium frontend system for multiple brands, balancing motion, content structure, service navigation, and conversion-focused presentation.
